reason: EBS is part of alicloud-ecs-ops, not NAS

query: Set up a VPC peering between my two VPCs
reason: VPC is a different product (alicloud-vpc-ops); NAS uses VPC but is not the VPC skill

query: Show me my monthly bill for NAS
Grant a RAM user permission to read from my NAS
reason: RAM policy authoring is owned by alicloud-ram-ops

query: I need to use HDFS for a Hadoop cluster
reason: HDFS is not NAS; use the data analytics skill

query: Configure CDN to deliver content from my origin storage
reason: CDN is a different product; NAS is not a CDN origin (use OSS + CDN)

query: Restart my ECS instance
reason: ECS operations are owned by alicloud-ecs-ops; this skill only handles NAS

query: How do I analyze slow SQL queries in my MySQL database?
reason: Slow SQL analysis is a database skill (alicloud-das-ops / alicloud-rds-ops)
